activities_projects.title: Poem Reading Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the basic idea of the poem
steps: Read the poem 'The Lake Isle of Innisfree'
Identify where the poet wants to go
Write why the poet wants to live there
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the main idea of the poem

activities_projects.title: Nature Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognize elements of nature in the poem
steps: Find natural elements mentioned in the poem
Write words like lake, bee, morning, and linnet
Explain how nature is important in the poem

activities_projects.title: Drawing the Island
steps: Imagine the Lake Isle of Innisfree
Draw the cabin, lake, and trees
Label the important parts

activities_projects.title: Peace and Nature Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the poet’s desire for peace
steps: Read the stanza about peace
Write how peace comes slowly in nature
Explain why the poet feels peaceful in Innisfree
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of peace and nature

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn new words from the poem
steps: Find words like glade, linnet, lapping
Write their meanings
Use them in simple sentences

activities_projects.title: Feelings in the Poem
activities_projects.objective: Identify the emotions expressed by the poet
steps: Read the poem carefully
Write how the poet feels about the island
Write two emotions expressed in the poem

activities_projects.title: Reading Aloud Activity
steps: Practice reading the poem
Focus on rhythm and pauses
Read it aloud in class

activities_projects.title: Line Meaning Activity
steps: Write the line 'And I shall have some peace there'
Explain its meaning in simple words
Discuss your answer with classmates

activities_projects.title: Dream Place Writing
steps: Think about a peaceful place you like
Write 5 sentences describing it
Explain why you like that place

activities_projects.title: Message of the Poem
activities_projects.objective: Understand the theme of the poem
steps: Think about why the poet wants to leave the city
Write the message of the poem
Explain it in 3-4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the theme of peace and simplicity in nature
